member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Formatters.DreamineTextLogFormatter
member.summary: Formats Dreamine log entries as plain text.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogFormatter
member.summary: Defines a formatter that converts a Dreamine log entry to text.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogFormatter.Format(Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry)
member.summary: Formats the specified log entry.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger
member.summary: Defines the main logging API used by Dreamine components.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Trace(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a trace log message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Debug(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a debug log message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Info(System.String)
member.summary: Writes an information log message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Warning(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a warning log message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Error(System.String)
member.summary: Writes an error log message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Error(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an error log message with an exception.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Fatal(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a fatal log message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Fatal(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a fatal log message with an exception.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogger.Write(Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry)
member.summary: Writes a log entry directly.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink
member.summary: Defines a log output target.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink.Write(Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry)
member.summary: Writes a log entry to the sink.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore
member.summary: Defines a readable log store used by UI or diagnostics.

member.name: E:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore.LogAdded
member.summary: Occurs when a log entry is added.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore.GetEntries
member.summary: Gets all stored log entries.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore.Add(Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry)
member.summary: Adds a log entry.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore.Clear
member.summary: Clears all stored log entries.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry
member.summary: Represents a single Dreamine log entry.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the time when the log entry was created.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.Level
member.summary: Gets the severity level of the log entry.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.Category
member.summary: Gets the log category.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.Message
member.summary: Gets the log message.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception associated with the log entry.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.ThreadId
member.summary: Gets the managed thread id where the log entry was created.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.TimestampText
member.summary: Gets the formatted timestamp text.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry.DisplayText
member.summary: Gets the display text used by simple UI views.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The time when the log entry was created.
The exception associated with the log entry.

member.summary: Defines the severity level of a Dreamine log entry.

member.summary: Detailed diagnostic information.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel.Debug
member.summary: Debugging information.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel.Info
member.summary: General information.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel.Warning
member.summary: Warning information.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel.Error
member.summary: Error information.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel.Fatal
member.summary: Fatal error information.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions
member.summary: Provides configuration options for Dreamine logging registration.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the log category name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.LogDirectory
member.summary: Gets or sets the log directory path.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.StoreCapacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of log entries kept in memory.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.QueueCapacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the async queue capacity.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.DrainBatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of entries drained per batch.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.FlushEveryWriteCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of writes before flushing the text file sink.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions.ShutdownTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the shutdown timeout used to drain pending log entries.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Registration.DreamineLoggingRegistration
member.summary: Provides registration helpers for Dreamine logging services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Registration.DreamineLoggingRegistration.Register(System.Action{Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions})
member.summary: Registers Dreamine core logging services.
member.returns: An async-disposable handle that drains the registered sink on disposal.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Registration.DreamineLoggingRegistration.Register(Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions)
member.summary: Registers Dreamine core logging services.
member.returns: An async-disposable handle that drains the registered sink on disposal.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Services.DreamineLogger
member.summary: Provides the default Dreamine logger implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Services.DreamineLogger.#ctor(Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Services.DreamineLogger.#ctor(Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Services.DreamineLogger.#ctor(Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink,Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a single sink, minimum level, and category.
member.remarks: Convenience overload that wraps a single sink as IEnumerable<IDreamineLogSink> internally so callers do not need to construct a one-element array when using or any other single-sink pipeline.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Services.DreamineLogger.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink},Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogLevel,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Services.InMemoryLogStore
member.summary: Stores Dreamine log entries in memory using a bounded ring buffer.
member.remarks: Backed by a so that capacity enforcement is O(1) per insert (no List.RemoveAt(0) shifting cost). Thread-safe.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Services.InMemoryLogStore.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the default capacity of 1000 entries.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Services.InMemoryLogStore.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The maximum number of log entries to keep.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.AsyncQueueSink
member.summary: Decorates a synchronous log sink with a bounded background queue.
member.remarks: Producers (any thread calling ) only enqueue; a single dedicated worker drains the queue and forwards entries to the inner sink. Designed to keep logging non-blocking on caller threads and to bound memory usage. When the queue is full the oldest pending entry is dropped instead of blocking the caller, so logging cannot stall the application. The number of dropped entries is observable via .

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.AsyncQueueSink.DroppedCount
member.summary: Gets the number of entries that were dropped because the queue was full.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.AsyncQueueSink.#ctor(Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The synchronous sink to forward entries to.
The maximum number of pending entries. Default is 8192.
Maximum number of entries the worker drains per inner-sink dispatch loop. Larger values reduce per-entry overhead. Default is 256.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.AsyncQueueSink.Write(Dreamine.Logging.Models.DreamineLogEntry)
member.remarks: Non-blocking. Safe to call from any thread including high-frequency worker loops. If the queue is full the oldest entry is dropped.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.AsyncQueueSink.ShutdownAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Stops accepting new entries and waits for pending entries to drain.
member.param: Maximum time to wait for the worker to finish.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.CompositeLogSink
member.summary: Writes log entries to multiple log sinks.
member.remarks: Implements so that disposing the composite disposes any inner sinks that hold unmanaged resources (e.g. file handles in ). This allows the outermost owner (typically ) to cleanly release the entire chain through a single Dispose call.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.CompositeLogSink.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogSink})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.CompositeLogSink.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes any inner sinks that implement .

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.TextFileLogSink
member.summary: Writes Dreamine log entries to daily text log files.
member.remarks: Keeps the current daily log file open across writes instead of opening and closing a file per entry. Flushes either every flushEveryWriteCount entries or immediately when an entry has level or higher, so important diagnostics are persisted promptly. Date rollover is detected automatically. Thread-safe; recommended placement is behind so file I/O runs on a single background worker.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Sinks.TextFileLogSink.#ctor(System.String,Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogFormatter,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The number of writes between flush operations. Defaults to 20. Entries with level or higher are always flushed immediately regardless of this value.
